isolation.state: in-memory Zustand, fresh on page load

steps.expected: Worldview tab active with empty scene strip showing 'New Scene' button
steps.observed: Worldview tab active, scene strip shows '+ New Scene' button and 'Create a new scene to get started' message

steps.expected: Scene chip appears with scene number and becomes active
steps.observed: Scene 1 chip appeared with number '1', amber highlight indicating active state, 'Create a 3D World' CTA and bottom prompt bar appeared

steps.action: Create second scene by clicking 'New Scene'
steps.expected: Scene 2 chip appears and becomes active
steps.observed: Scene 2 chip appeared and became active

steps.expected: Scene 1 becomes active with amber highlight and glow shadow
steps.observed: Scene 1 gained amber highlight, Scene 2 lost highlight. Remove button appeared for Scene 1 (active scene). Content area shows 'Create a 3D World' CTA for this scene.

steps.expected: Scene strip overflows and scrolls horizontally, New Scene button remains accessible
steps.observed: 9 scene chips displayed in a horizontal row. The 'New Scene' button is visible at the right edge (partially clipped, confirming overflow/scroll behavior). All scene chips are accessible and the New Scene button remains clickable.

assertions.title: Empty scene shows Create World CTA

steps.action: View active scene with no world assigned
steps.expected: Canvas mode displays 'Create a 3D World' CTA with dashed border, Globe2 icon, and hover amber glow
steps.observed: CTA button displays 'Create a 3D World' text with Globe2 icon above it. On hover, the border changes to amber/gold dashed style and the icon turns amber, confirming the hover glow effect.

steps.action: Hover over active Scene 9 to reveal delete button
steps.expected: Remove button appears on the active scene chip
Scene 9 chip removed, another scene becomes active
steps.observed: Scene 9 removed. 8 scenes remain (Scene 1-8). Scene 1 became the new active scene with amber highlight.

steps.action: Observe bottom area of canvas mode
steps.expected: Bottom prompt bar visible with Sparkles icon and text input, amber/gold theme, dark glass-morphic styling
steps.observed: Bottom prompt bar is visible below the CTA area. It includes a Sparkles icon (star/sparkle graphic) on the left and a text input with placeholder 'Describe what you'd like to create...'. The bar has a semi-transparent dark background with subtle border, matching the glass-morphic panel design language.

frictions.description: The 'Remove Scene' button only appears on hover over the active scene chip — not immediately visible. This is by design but could confuse users looking for a delete action.
frictions.resolution: Hovered over the active scene chip to reveal the remove button

frictions.description: The '+ New Scene' text could not be found using 'find text' semantic locator (the + symbol caused matching issues). Had to use 'find role button --name' instead.
frictions.resolution: Used ref-based clicking and 'find role button --name New Scene' for reliable interaction

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Scene management (create, select, scroll, CTA, delete, prompt bar) works correctly. No console errors detected. All UI elements match the specification including amber highlights, Globe2 icon, Sparkles icon, dashed borders, and glass-morphic styling.
